name: nbm-jest-acceptance-fixture
description: Real jest project for the native acceptance IT's npm leg (PRD-4 S1 / #59). Carries a deliberately-failing test so run_tests returns ok=false with a failures[].kind="test" finding. node_modules is NOT committed: the --no-install invariant (D38) requires it to be installed out-of-band by CI (npm install) before the IT runs; the IT receives this dir via the nbm.it.jest.project.dir system property.
